summary: All AI inference (LLM completion, tool calling, vision/multimodal, embeddings, transcription) runs on-device via the QVAC SDK. The app makes ZERO remote AI/LLM/embedding/transcription/vision calls — photos attached for identification are analysed on-device and never uploaded. The remote calls listed below are optional, non-AI infrastructure (authentication, observation sync) plus one-time QVAC model distribution. The app is fully functional offline.

remote_calls.purpose: One-time download of on-device model weights (LLAMA_TOOL_CALLING_1B, Whisper, EmbeddingGemma, and a multimodal VLM — Qwen3-VL 2B or SmolVLM2 500M depending on device RAM, fetched only on first photo attach) on first use; cached locally thereafter and never re-fetched.
remote_calls.when: first launch, or first use of each capability (the VLM only if Vision is used)
remote_calls.data_sent: model identifiers only — no user data, no prompts

remote_calls.purpose: Email/Google sign-in and embedded Solana wallet creation; shared account with the Stellar web app. The on-device AI features work without signing in.
Sync logged observations (target, notes, timestamp) to the shared backend when online. The app logs observations locally and works fully offline without this.
remote_calls.when: after an observation is logged, only if Supabase is configured and the device is online
remote_calls.data_sent: observation text records only — no audio, no images, no prompts
